content: {"file":"@angular/common/fesm22/common.mjs","summary":"This file contains Angular Common module exports including DOM utilities, platform location services, localization pipes and directives, and image optimization components.","rules":[{"name":"Assert Non-Empty Input","description":"Ensures that specified inputs are non-empty strings.","conditions":["assertNonEmptyInput(dir, name, value)"],"actions":["throw new RuntimeError"]},{"name":"Validate NgSrcset Attribute","description":"Checks if ngSrcset attribute is valid and throws error if invalid.","conditions":["assertValidNgSrcset(dir, value)"],"actions":["throw new RuntimeError"]}],"dependencies":["@angular/core","rxjs","zone.js","tslib","./dom/dom_adapter","./platform/platform_location","./facade/lang","./facade/collection","./facade/async","./facade/promise","./facade/iterable","./facade/browser","./facade/console","./facade/facade","./facade/exceptions","./facade/number_format","./facade/i18n","./facade/xml","./facade/window","./facade/environment","./core_private","./private_export_core_private","./render3/interfaces","./render3/instructions","./render3/r3_ast","./render3/view","./render3/node","./render3/element","./render3/host_element","./render3/component","./render3/directive","./render3/pipes","./render3/query","./render3/literal_map","./render3/literal_array","./render3/resource_loader","./render3/view_engine_compatibility","./render3/r3_module"]}`
